testsuite.name: Loan Desk rules oracle — headless (the CI-safe pipeline stage)

testcase.name: decline-low-score — credit score below 580 declines
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr

testcase.name: decline-high-dti — DTI over 50% declines
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr

testcase.name: review-score-band — score 580-669 routes to review
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr

testcase.name: review-dti-band — DTI 40-50% routes to review
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr

testcase.name: approve-prime — prime, low DTI, auto-approves at 6.5%
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr

testcase.name: approve-midband — 660-719 band, low DTI, auto-approve at 9.9%
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr

testcase.name: approve-loyalty — existing customer loyalty discount
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('personal-loan', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.decision == exp.decision * result.apr == exp.apr
